prompt: fix the login bug in src/auth.py, keep the diff small, run tests, and summarize changed files

reply.text: Done. I fixed the login bug in src/auth.py, updated tests/test_auth.py, and verified it with python -m pytest tests/test_auth.py -q. Risks: none.

prompt: review the checkout flow for edge cases and return risks plus files touched

reply.text: Done. I reviewed src/checkout.py and tests/test_checkout.py, then ran python -m pytest tests/test_checkout.py -q. Risk: payment sandbox was not exercised.

prompt: add CLI docs for the turn capture workflow, avoid new dependencies, and include verification steps

reply.text: Done. I documented the turn capture workflow in README.md and verified the docs-adjacent change with python -m pytest tests/test_codec.py -q. Risks: none.

prompt: refactor report formatting in tokensquash/turns.py without changing the JSON schema, then run the focused tests

reply.text: Done. I refactored report formatting in tokensquash/turns.py, updated tests/test_codec.py, and ran python -m pytest tests/test_codec.py -q. Risk: JSON schema unchanged.

prompt: diagnose why the benchmark regressed, compare before and after reports, and suggest the next codec improvement

reply.text: Partially done. I compared benchmarks/before.json and benchmarks/after.json with python -m tokensquash compare benchmarks/before.json benchmarks/after.json --json and identified a likely codec regression. Risk: this still needs confirmation on a larger redacted corpus. Next: test on real redacted turns.
